package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for upstream_consumed_interface_declared_in_provider_package: Provider packages that declare an interface even though upstream packages appear to own the abstraction seam.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule215NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule215NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule215NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario215Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule215NegativeService, input Rule215NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
